name: accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 10–50 invoices/month, manual calculations cause late tax filings. We automate report generation instead of manual spreadsheet calculations.
problem_solved: Inaccurate sales tax reporting due to manual processes.
